# VariatedSweetBerries

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/oC4mcis1?style=flat-square&label=Downloads&labelColor=0080FF&color=800080)
![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/oC4mcis1?style=flat-square&label=Followers&labelColor=0080FF&color=800080)
![Modrinth Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/oC4mcis1?style=flat-square&label=Project%20Version&labelColor=0080ff&color=800080)
![Modrinth Game Versions](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/game-versions/oC4mcis1?style=flat-square&label=Minecraft%20Versions&labelColor=0080ff&color=800080)


## Description

This resource pack adds new variations to sweet berry bushes. There are now blue and black sweet berry bushes in addition to the red ones. The item texture is updated too. For previews take a look in the [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/variated-sweet-berries/gallery).

## Versions

The resourcepack is for every Minecraft Version above 1.20.2, for an exclusive Fabric Download, [join my Discord](https://discord.gg/MqQ7Mus6Q9). For all Versions, see [Versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/variated-sweet-berries/versions).
